mapper.select:
SELECT id,name,title,avatar_url,bio,create_time,update_time,deleted FROM lecturer WHERE deleted = 0
AND name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO lecturer(name, title, avatar_url, bio, create_time, update_time, deleted) VALUES (#{name}, #{title}, #{avatarUrl}, #{bio}, NOW(), NOW(), 0)
mapper.update:
UPDATE lecturer
name = #{name}, title = #{title}, avatar_url = #{avatarUrl}, bio = #{bio}, update_time = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT id,name,title,avatar_url,bio,create_time,update_time,deleted FROM lecturer WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE lecturer SET deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
